code:
import io
import string

fn rot13_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    if b + 13 > 90
      b - 13
    else
      b + 13
    end
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    if b + 13 > 122
      b - 13
    else
      b + 13
    end
  else
    b
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      let r = rot13_byte(b)
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(r)}"
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
